LAW AND MOTION 302, TO CHARGE PARTNER'S INTEREST AND ORDER ASSIGNING FUTURE EARNINGS AS AN ATTORNEY, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (GRANT ORDER CHARGING DEFENDANT'S KAMMY AU'S INTEREST IN TWO PARTNERSHIPS AND DIRECTING PAYMENT OF MONEY OR PROPERTY OWED TO KAMMY AU TO PLAINTIFF. COURT FURTHER ORDERS 25% OF FUTURE NET INCOME OF PARTNERSHIPS TO BE PAID TO PLAINTIFF). COURT REQUIRES MR. AU WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER ORDER TO FILE STATEMENT/DECLARATION RE COMPLIED WITH PROVISIONS AND THEN EVERY 60 DAYS FILE STATEMENT/DECLARATION UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY HAS PAID 25% OF FUTURE NET INCOME OF PARTNERSHIPS TO PLTF UNTIL JUDGMENT AMOUNT IS PAID. PLTF TO PREPARE ORDER. (AJR/AA), REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193)
